mapper.select: select r.id, r.reporter_id, m.nickname as reporter_nickname, case r.target_type when 'WORK' then '작품' when 'MEMBER' then '회원' when 'COMMENT' then '댓글' when 'GALLERY' then '예술관' else r.target_type end as category, r.target_type, r.target_id, case r.reason when 'SENSITIVE' then '음란/선정' when 'IMPERSONATION' then '사칭' when 'HARASSMENT' then '괴롭힘' when 'COPYRIGHT' then '저작권' else r.reason end as reason, r.detail as reason_detail, r.detail, r.status, r.resolved_at, r.resolved_at as processed_at, r.created_datetime as created_at, r.resolved_memo, r.resolved_memo as process_memo, case when r.target_type = 'WORK' then ( select w.title from tbl_work w where w.id = r.target_id ) when r.target_type = 'MEMBER' then ( select m2.nickname from tbl_member m2 where m2.id = r.target_id ) else 'unknown' end as target_name, case when r.target_type = 'WORK' then ( select w.member_id from tbl_work w where w.id = r.target_id ) when r.target_type = 'MEMBER' then r.target_id else null end as target_author_id, ( select count(*) from tbl_report r4 where r4.target_type = r.target_type and r4.target_id = r.target_id ) as target_report_count, case when r.target_type = 'WORK' then ( select w2.status from tbl_work w2 where w2.id = r.target_id ) when r.target_type = 'MEMBER' then ( select m3.status from tbl_member m3 where m3.id = r.target_id ) else null end as target_status, case when r.target_type = 'WORK' then ( select tm.nickname from tbl_work w3 join tbl_member tm on w3.member_id = tm.id where w3.id = r.target_id ) when r.target_type = 'MEMBER' then ( select m4.nickname from tbl_member m4 where m4.id = r.target_id ) else null end as target_author_name, case when r.target_type = 'WORK' then ( select tm.nickname from tbl_work w5 join tbl_member tm on w5.member_id = tm.id where w5.id = r.target_id ) when r.target_type = 'MEMBER' then ( select m5.nickname from tbl_member m5 where m5.id = r.target_id ) else null end as target_author, case when r.target_type = 'WORK' then ( select tm2.status from tbl_work w4 join tbl_member tm2 on w4.member_id = tm2.id where w4.id = r.target_id ) else null end as target_author_status, ( select count(*) from tbl_report r3 where r3.reporter_id = r.reporter_id ) as reporter_history_count, ( select count(*) from tbl_report r6 where r6.reporter_id = r.reporter_id ) as reporter_total_count from tbl_report r join tbl_member m on r.reporter_id = m.id where r.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update tbl_report set status = #{status}, resolved_memo = #{memo}, resolved_at = case when #{status} = 'RESOLVED' then now() else resolved_at end, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
